mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.title, t.description, t.reward_amount, t.publisher_id, t.receiver_id, t.status, t.deadline_time, t.create_time, t.update_time, up.nickname AS publisher_nickname, ur.nickname AS receiver_nickname FROM t_task t LEFT JOIN t_user up ON t.publisher_id = up.id LEFT JOIN t_user ur ON t.receiver_id = ur.id ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.description, t.reward_amount, t.publisher_id, t.receiver_id, t.status, t.deadline_time, t.create_time, t.update_time, up.nickname AS publisher_nickname, ur.nickname AS receiver_nickname FROM t_task t LEFT JOIN t_user up ON t.publisher_id = up.id LEFT JOIN t_user ur ON t.receiver_id = ur.id WHERE t.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.description, t.reward_amount, t.publisher_id, t.receiver_id, t.status, t.deadline_time, t.create_time, t.update_time, up.nickname AS publisher_nickname, ur.nickname AS receiver_nickname FROM t_task t LEFT JOIN t_user up ON t.publisher_id = up.id LEFT JOIN t_user ur ON t.receiver_id = ur.id WHERE t.receiver_id = #{userId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.description, t.reward_amount, t.publisher_id, t.receiver_id, t.status, t.deadline_time, t.create_time, t.update_time, up.nickname AS publisher_nickname, ur.nickname AS receiver_nickname FROM t_task t LEFT JOIN t_user up ON t.publisher_id = up.id LEFT JOIN t_user ur ON t.receiver_id = ur.id WHERE t.publisher_id = #{userId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_task SET receiver_id = #{receiverId}, status = 'TAKEN', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId} AND status = 'OPEN' AND (deadline_time IS NULL OR deadline_time > NOW())
UPDATE t_task SET status = 'FINISHED', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId} AND status = 'TAKEN'
UPDATE t_task SET status = 'CANCELLED', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId} AND status = 'TAKEN'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_task (title, description, reward_amount, publisher_id, receiver_id, status, deadline_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{rewardAmount}, #{publisherId}, NULL, 'OPEN', #{deadlineTime})
